nasb.text: But there is some good in you, for you have removed the Asheroth from the land and you have set your heart to seek God.”

esv.text: Nevertheless, some good is found in you, for you destroyed the Asheroth out of the land, and have set your heart to seek God.”

cnv.text: 可是你還有善行，因為你從國中除掉亞舍拉，並且決心尋求　神。”

ccb.text: 然而你还有善行，因为你铲除境内的亚舍拉神像，立志寻求上帝。”
